title: Automated Dysphagia Screening Using Noninvasive Neck Acoustic Sensing

methodology.approach: Machine learning model using acoustic data from noninvasive neck acoustic sensing
methodology.data_collection: Audiometric data collected during fiberoptic endoscopic evaluation of swallowing (FEES)

key_findings: The system achieved promising classification performance
Surface digital auscultation captures acoustic signatures with diagnostic value
The model addresses limitations of prior work by using comprehensive swallow evaluations and more than 600 swallow events
limitations_of_prior_work: No real-time assessments during gold-standard evaluations
Validation using only single bolus consistency
Small sample sizes in proof-of-concept designs
